channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ATGL] Adani Total Gas launches "Saksham Niveshak" for unpaid dividends
item.description:
Adani Total Gas Ltd has launched the "Saksham Niveshak" campaign from April 1, 2026, to July 9, 2026, at the request of the Investor's Education and Protection Fund Authority (IEPFA). The campaign aims to create awareness among shareholders to update their details and claim any unpaid or unclaimed dividends before these amounts are transferred to the IEPF. Shareholders are urged to update KYC details, including PAN, nomination, contact information, and bank account details, with the company or its Registrar & Transfer Agent, MUFG Intime India Private Limited. Dividends are payable electronically, necessitating accurate bank information. The company has provided multiple submission channels for required forms (ISR-1, ISR-2, SH-13, ISR-3), including post, email, and an online portal, and encourages tracking requests via the SWAYAM portal. Shareholders with electronic shares can update details through their Depository Participants. The company will also send direct communications regarding unpaid dividends.

  • Adani Total Gas launches "Saksham Niveshak" campaign for shareholders.
  • Campaign runs from April 1, 2026, to July 9, 2026.
  • Aims to help shareholders claim unpaid or unclaimed dividends.
  • Shareholders must update KYC and bank details to receive payments.
  • Multiple submission methods provided for necessary documents.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adani Total Gas Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MIT] Maple Infra Trust Q4 FY26 Unitholding: Sponsor Holds 75%
item.description:
Maple Infrastructure Trust (MIT) has filed its unitholding pattern for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in compliance with SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014. The report indicates that the Sponsor(s) / Investment Manager / Project Manager(s) and their associates/related parties and Sponsor Group collectively hold 35,45,79,900 units, which constitutes 75.00% of the total outstanding units. The public holding accounts for the remaining 11,81,93,300 units, representing 25.00% of the total. Within the public holding, institutions, primarily Alternative Investment Funds, hold 13.44%, while non-institutions, including individuals, NBFCs, trusts, NRIs, and bodies corporate, hold 11.56%. The total units outstanding for MIT are 47,27,73,200.

  • Maple Infrastructure Trust filed Q4 FY26 unitholding pattern.
  • Sponsor and group hold 75.00% of total units.
  • Public holding stands at 25.00% of total units.
  • Total units outstanding are 47,27,73,200.
  • Filing complies with SEBI InvIT Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maple Infrastructure Trust | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [NGIL] Nakoda Board to meet on April 30 for Q4/FY26 results & Auditor
item.description:
Nakoda Group of Industries Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 30, 2026, at 03:30 P.M. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the board will address the appointment or reappointment of the Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-2027. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for designated persons will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of these financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • To consider and approve Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Appointment/reappointment of Internal Auditor for FY27 on agenda.
  • Trading window closed for designated persons until results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nakoda Group of Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IIFLWAM] 360 ONE WAM: Monitoring Report for ₹391.59 Cr Preferential Issue
item.description:
360 ONE WAM LTD has submitted the monitoring agency report by CARE Ratings Limited for its preferential issue of warrants for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report, mandated by SEBI regulations, confirms no deviation from the stated objects of the issue. The preferential issue, with a size of ₹391.59 crore, had no funds called or utilized during the reported quarter. The report was reviewed by the company's Audit Committee and Board of Directors on April 21, 2026.

  • Monitoring agency report for preferential issue of warrants submitted.
  • CARE Ratings found no deviation from the issue's stated objects.
  • Report covers the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The preferential issue size was ₹391.59 crore.
  • No funds were called or utilized during the reported quarter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 360 One Wam Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [SUNTECK] Sunteck Realty Declares ₹1.50 Final Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Sunteck Realty's Board of Directors approved the audited financial statements and results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹1.50 per equity share (150% of face value) for FY2026, which is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The statutory auditors, Walker Chandiok & Co. LLP, issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements. Additionally, M/s. Kejriwal & Associates was appointed as the Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27.

  • Board approved FY26 audited financial results.
  • Recommended ₹1.50 final dividend per equity share.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at AGM.
  • Statutory auditors issued an unmodified opinion.
  • Kejriwal & Associates appointed as Cost Auditor for FY26-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNTECK REALTY LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MIT] Maple Infra Trust reports zero investor complaints for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Maple Infrastructure Trust (MIT) has submitted its investor grievance report for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The report, filed in compliance with SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, and a SEBI Master Circular, indicates a clean record with zero investor complaints. There were no complaints pending at the beginning of the year or quarter, no new complaints received, and consequently, zero complaints pending at the end of both the financial year and the quarter. This reflects effective investor grievance management by the Trust.

  • Maple Infrastructure Trust filed its Q4 FY26 investor grievance report.
  • Zero investor complaints were pending at the start of FY26 or Q4 FY26.
  • No new investor complaints were received during the entire FY26 or Q4 FY26.
  • All complaints, if any, were disposed of, resulting in zero pending at quarter-end.
  • The report indicates strong investor satisfaction or effective grievance redressal.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maple Infrastructure Trust | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [MPHASIS] Mphasis acquires TAP for up to CAD 30M, boosts AI decisioning
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mphasis Ireland Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Mphasis, has acquired 100% shareholding in Theory and Practice Business Intelligence Inc. (TAP) and its affiliates. TAP, a technology company founded in 2018, developed Continuum AI, a Decision Intelligence platform that combines AI with behavioral economics to improve business decision-making and understanding buyer behavior. The acquisition involves an upfront consideration of CAD 10 million at closing, with a management milestone-based, multi-year contingent consideration of up to CAD 20 million. This strategic move strengthens Mphasis's 'Decisioning Intelligence' capabilities and aligns with its NeoIP™ roadmap, enabling advanced AI for demand forecasting, pricing, marketing, and supply chain decisions across various industry verticals. Mphasis CEO Nitin Rakesh stated that Continuum AI will be a key catalyst for NeoIP™, driving measurable economic outcomes and extending Mphasis's reach into critical AI spend initiatives.

  • Mphasis acquired 100% of Theory and Practice Business Intelligence Inc. (TAP).
  • Acquisition consideration is CAD 10M upfront, with up to CAD 20M contingent.
  • TAP's Continuum AI platform enhances Mphasis's 'Decisioning Intelligence' capabilities.
  • The deal strengthens Mphasis's AI offerings for enterprise decision-making.
  • It aligns with Mphasis's NeoIP™ roadmap, targeting AI spending initiatives.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MPHASIS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PURPLEFIN] Purple Finance: New Deputy CEO, Head of Collection, Internal Auditor
item.description:
Purple Finance Ltd announced significant management changes and an auditor appointment. Mr. Souvik Dasgupta has been re-designated and appointed as Deputy CEO, effective April 21, 2026, and will be part of the Senior Management. Mr. Amit Semwal was appointed as Head – Collection, also effective April 21, 2026. Additionally, M/s. Agre Dasija Patel & Associates LLP have been appointed as the Internal Auditor for the Financial Year 2026-27, with effect from April 01, 2026. These changes were approved by the Board of Directors at their meeting on April 21, 2026.

  • Souvik Dasgupta re-designated as Deputy CEO, effective April 21, 2026.
  • Amit Semwal appointed Head – Collection, effective April 21, 2026.
  • Agre Dasija Patel & Associates LLP appointed Internal Auditor for FY27.
  • All changes were approved by the Board of Directors on April 21, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Purple Finance Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [INDHOTEL] IHCL completes 51% acquisition of Brij Hospital for up to ₹222 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

The Indian Hotels Company Limited (IHCL), along with its step-down subsidiaries ANK Hotels Private Limited and Pride Hospitality Private Limited, has completed the acquisition of a 51% stake in Brij Hospital Private Limited (Brij). The total investment for this acquisition is up to ₹222 crores. The transaction involved both purchasing shares from existing shareholders of Brij and making a primary investment through a combination of Compulsorily Convertible Preference Shares and partly paid-up equity shares. As a result of this acquisition, Brij Hospital Private Limited has become a subsidiary of IHCL.

  • IHCL acquired a 51% stake in Brij Hospital Private Limited.
  • The total investment for the acquisition is up to ₹222 crores.
  • The acquisition involved both secondary and primary investment.
  • Brij Hospital Private Limited is now a subsidiary of IHCL.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN HOTELS CO.LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MPHASIS] Mphasis Appoints Rogayeh Tabrizi as EVP CPG & Head of Decision AI
item.description:
Mphasis Ltd has announced the appointment of Ms. Rogayeh Tabrizi as Executive Vice President (EVP) – Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG) and Head of Decision AI, effective April 21, 2026. Ms. Tabrizi brings over two decades of experience across financial services, retail, and logistics, specializing in leveraging data-driven insights and artificial intelligence for value creation. She founded Theory and Practice Business Intelligence Inc. (TAP), which developed Continuum AI, a Decision Intelligence platform. Her extensive background includes work at CERN, a PhD in Economics, and studies at Stanford University. She is also a recognized AI thought leader and author of "Behavioral AI: Unleash Decision Making with Data."

  • Mphasis appointed Rogayeh Tabrizi as EVP CPG and Head of Decision AI.
  • Her appointment is effective from April 21, 2026.
  • Tabrizi brings over two decades of experience in AI and data-driven insights.
  • She founded a technology company focused on Decision Intelligence.
  • Her expertise is expected to strengthen Mphasis's leadership in AI and CPG.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MPHASIS LTD. | Category: Management Change
